title: Vibe Coding
content:
# Vibe Coding — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Vibe Coding:** Harga Rp 13.000.000 (atau cicil 4×3.250.000/bln tanpa bunga — harga sama) · IT STEP Academy certificate (setelah ujian final).


Source: https://itstep.id/vibe-coding. This is the fact base for Stepan. Only
state what's here. Don't invent prices/dates.

## Essence
Course you can take OFFLINE at the campus OR join ONLINE (remotely): building real
applications with the help of AI. Taught in Bahasa
Indonesia (technical terms in English). Group of up to 14 people, a practicing
developer-instructor. All tool subscriptions provided (Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude,
Gemini, GitHub Copilot). Access to a computer and a workspace.

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/id/vibe-coding
- Brochure (PDF): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QTrbfI1eKuo8AjLKas0iZlijucAbhHZk/view

## Who it's for
- People who want to build products without classical programming
- Career switchers
- Junior developers
- People with an app idea who want to make it real

NOT a fit for: those after quick money; those expecting AI to do everything;
senior developers; those who can't attend regularly.

## Requirements
Basic computer literacy (files, browser, installing software). No coding experience needed.

## Curriculum — 26 modules, 6 directions
1. Foundations — what AI is, prompt engineering
2. Toolkit — AI working tools (Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code)
3. Code Literacy — web basics (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, DOM)
4. Control — Git, GitHub, version control
5. Architecture — full-stack design, MVC, MVP planning
6. Ship — deploy, testing, publishing to production

## Classes
37 sessions, twice a week, 2 academic hours each (2×45 min) with a break. Evening format.

## Enrollment and start of classes
- **Enrollment: open now**, until the group fills up — seats are limited (group of ≤14;
  currently ~10 of 14 seats left).
- **Classes start: July 11, 2026.**
Groups:
- Group A: Monday & wednesday
- Group B: Tuesday & thursday
- Group C: wednesday & friday
Evening format.

## Price (IDR)
- **Price: 13,000,000.** This is THE price (Early Bird has ended — never quote 11,000,000).
- **Installments:** can be split into **4 × 3,250,000/month, interest-free** — the same
  price, not higher. Full payment and instalments are both fine; never make the lead
  choose "price OR cicilan".
- **Book-now discount:** reserving the seat with a **500,000 advance (DP) within 24 hours**
  gives **1,000,000 off → 12,000,000** (or **4 × 3,000,000/month**). The 500k DP counts
  toward the total; the balance is paid later (in full or in instalments) before/while
  classes run. Vibe Coding only — does NOT apply to Python Back-End. (When to deploy this
  lever — see persona.)
- Payment methods & the 500k booking deposit — see FAQ (academy-wide).

## Outcome
Final project — a complete full-stack application: front + back + database,
deployed at a URL, a GitHub repo with clean commit history, a README, in the
portfolio. Examples: booking systems, dashboards, CRM, task managers, forms with
a database. IT STEP Academy certificate — after passing the final exam and
defending the project.

## vs Python Back-End Developer + AI (routing hint)
- Goal = BUILD & LAUNCH own product fast with AI, no need to become a programmer
  (4 months) → THIS course.
- Goal = BECOME A PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPER (job in IT, deep fundamentals, Django,
  8 months) → Python Back-End Developer + AI.

## Location (campus)
Menara Sudirman, 8th floor — Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav. 60, Jakarta (right across
from FX Sudirman). Offline classes are held here (you can invite the lead to visit);
leads who can't come in person can join ONLINE (remotely) instead.

## Not in the base (if asked — escalate to a manager)
- ONLINE option IS available (join remotely) — offer it to anyone who can't attend
  offline; only the exact online mechanics (platform, live/recorded) → team confirms
- Individual discounts beyond the listed price / book-now discount / installments
- Corporate / group terms
- Refunds, transfer to another cohort

title: Python Back-End Development + AI
content:
# Python Back-End Developer + AI — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Python Back-End Developer + AI:** Harga Rp 1.670.000/bln (×8 = Rp 13.360.000 total; atau 2×6.480.000/semester) · 2×/minggu (16 jam/bln) · IT STEP certificate.


Source: https://itstep.id/python. Fact base — only state what's here, don't
invent prices/dates/discounts.

## Who it's for
- Adults 18–55 who want to become professional BACK-END DEVELOPERS (get a job in IT)
- Career switchers ready for a deeper, longer path (8 months) with classic coding
  fundamentals; university students; non-IT professionals; IT pros upgrading skills
- No prior IT experience needed
- NOT a fit: wants to build & launch their own product FAST with AI without
  becoming a programmer → recommend Vibe Coding instead. Kids → manager.

## Essence
Course at the academy you can take OFFLINE or join ONLINE (remotely): become a Python
back-end developer with modern AI
skills. Classic programming fundamentals (Python, OOP, SOLID) + web basics +
Django/REST + OpenAI API & LangChain. Practical tasks and real-world cases,
in-person classroom instruction.

## Curriculum — 46 modules, 4 blocks
1. Python Level 1 (17 modules): syntax, data types, loops, strings, lists,
   functions, OOP, design patterns, SOLID, AI/LLM tools, project management
2. Introduction to Web (6): HTML, CSS, graphics, tables, layout, forms
3. JavaScript (8): basics, objects, arrays, DOM, forms, JSON, async/await,
   server interaction
4. Python Advanced (15): databases, REST API, Django + Django REST Framework,
   chatbots, OpenAI API, LangChain

## Schedule
- Format: 2 sessions/week -> 8 sessions/month; 4 hours/week -> 16 hours/month
- Duration tracks (confirmed by manager): **Beginner 3 months** * **Intermediate 6 months** (eligible for BNSP certification) * **Professional 8 months** (eligible for BNSP certification). The full 8-month Professional track is the default; the prices below are for it
- Offline at Menara Sudirman (8th floor), Jakarta — Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav. 60; or join ONLINE (remotely)
- Start date of the next group: NOT on the site → needs_manager=true when asked

## Price (IDR) — THESE ARE PYTHON BACK-END PRICES, NOT VIBE CODING
⚠️ Never quote Vibe Coding prices (13,000,000 / 4×3,250,000) for this course — they are wrong here.
- **Monthly**: 1,670,000 / month × 8 months = 13,360,000 total
- **Per semester**: 2 × 6,480,000 = 12,960,000 total (≈1,620,000/month — cheaper than monthly)
- **Full upfront**: 12,570,000 total (≈1,571,250/month — best price, saves ~790k vs monthly)
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a seat; balance before course starts. NO book-now discount (the 1jt off is Vibe Coding only — never invent one).
- NO early-bird / promo stated — don't invent discounts.
Quote whichever plan fits the lead; full upfront is the best value pitch.

## Outcome
Back-end developer skill set: web applications, chatbots, databases, REST APIs,
async programming. Portfolio of practical projects. IT STEP certificate in English; the Intermediate & Professional tracks are also eligible for BNSP certification (Indonesian national competency standard).

## vs Vibe Coding (routing hint)
- Goal = BECOME A DEVELOPER (job in IT, deep fundamentals, 8 months) → THIS course.
- Goal = BUILD & LAUNCH own product fast using AI, without becoming a programmer
  (4 months) → Vibe Coding.

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/python
- Brochure (PDF): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jcb9BZE8vbheoJsV953eRci4iKW229G1/view

## Not in the base (if asked — escalate to a manager)
- Exact start date of the next group, group size
- Discounts/promos beyond the listed payment plans
- Corporate / kids' programs

title: Data Analyst
content:
# Data Analyst — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Data Analyst:** Harga Rp 1.670.000/bln (×9 = Rp 15.030.000 total; atau lunas 15.030.000) · 9 bulan · International IT STEP Academy diploma.


Source: itstep.id/data-analyst + English brochure. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- Beginners entering data analytics (no IT background needed, age 18–55, no entrance exam)
- Non-IT professionals expanding skills; working analysts leveling up
- Business owners / IT managers who want data-driven decisions
- NOT a fit for: under-18s; those who need a full university degree credential.

## Essence
Practical data analytics — SQL/MS SQL Server, Python (Pandas/NumPy/Matplotlib/Seaborn), Power BI, and Generative AI (ChatGPT/Copilot/OpenAI API). OFFLINE at campus OR joined ONLINE (remotely). Graduates can collect, clean, analyze and visualize data and turn it into business decisions.

## Curriculum (modules from brochure)
- **SQL & MS SQL Server**: relational model, SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, JOINs, normalization, aggregates, subqueries, stored procedures, triggers, functions, CTEs
- **Python for Data Analytics**: variables, strings, lists, dicts, OOP, exception handling, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn
- **Power BI for Business Analytics**: data import/transform/filter, reports, DAX, advanced features, dashboards (Note: Power BI, NOT Tableau)
- **Generative AI**: LLMs, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT prompting, OpenAI API integration

## Schedule & duration
- **Duration: 9 months**
- Age: 18–55
- Exact class days/frequency/start → needs_manager

## Price (IDR)
- **Monthly**: 1,670,000 / month (for 9 months) = 15,030,000 total
- **Full upfront**: 15,030,000 total

## Outcome
- **Certificate: International IT STEP Academy diploma** (in Indonesian + English, recognized in 24 countries)
- Portfolio of data projects; skills: SQL, Python data pipelines, Power BI dashboards, Generative AI workflows
- Roles: Data Analyst across finance, marketing, healthcare, tech
- Salary reference (USD, **global figures** — Indonesian market varies): entry $500–970/mo → mid $800–2,188 → senior $2,000–5,000
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a place; balance paid before course starts

## Short version — Data Analyst Mini Course (1-day intensive)
If a lead wants a quick taste or can't commit to the full 9-month program:
- **Price: Offline 600,000 IDR / Online 500,000 IDR** (full payment, one-time)
- **Duration: 1 day, 5 hours** (09:00–14:00); online or offline
- **Certificate: International IT STEP Academy certificate**
- Content: intro to data analytics — enough to evaluate the full program
- Start dates → needs_manager; mention this option for budget-hesitant or explore-first leads

## Location & format
Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav.60, Jakarta — OFFLINE at campus OR join ONLINE (remotely).

## Links
## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/data-analyst
- Brochures folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- start dates, session frequency, discounts, group/corporate terms

title: Cybersecurity Engineer + AI
content:
# Cybersecurity Engineer + AI — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Cybersecurity Engineer + AI:** Harga Rp 1.670.000/bln (×8 = Rp 13.360.000 total; atau 2×6.480.000/semester) · 8 bulan (120 jam), 2×/minggu · IT STEP Academy Certificate.


Source: itstep.id/cybersecurity + Bahasa brochure. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- Beginners starting an IT/security career; career changers into cybersecurity
- Students/grads strengthening CV; IT pros deepening security expertise
- Age: 18–55
- NOT a fit for: under-18s; anyone wanting a purely theoretical, non-technical program.

## Essence
Official Cisco Networking Academy program — from cybersecurity fundamentals to training that prepares you for the Cisco CyberOps Associate certification — hands-on labs + real SOC case studies. OFFLINE at campus OR joined ONLINE (remotely). Graduates leave with practical incident-response skills and a Cisco-backed credential, ready to pursue the certification.

## Curriculum (full list from brochure)
- Pengenalan Cybersecurity; Cybercrime Fighters
- Sistem Operasi Windows; Sistem Operasi Linux
- Network Protocols; Ethernet & Internet Protocol (IP)
- Connectivity Testing; ARP Protocol; Transport Layer
- Layanan Jaringan; Pemetaan Jaringan
- Infrastruktur Keamanan Jaringan; Threat Actors and Tools
- Common Threats and Attacks; Tools Monitoring Jaringan
- Prinsip Dasar Perlindungan dari Serangan; Access Control
- Layanan Intelijen Ancaman; Pengenalan Kriptografi
- Perlindungan Workstation dan Server
- Vulnerability Assessment untuk Workstations dan Servers
- Teknologi dan Protokol Keamanan Data Keamanan Jaringan
- Alert Sources
- Forensik Digital, Analisis, dan Respon Insiden
- **Cisco CyberOps Associate** certification track

## Schedule & duration
- **Duration: 8 months (120 hours total)**
- 2 sessions/week, 2 hours each
- Specific start dates / intake schedule → needs_manager

## Price (IDR) — THESE ARE CYBERSECURITY PRICES, NOT VIBE CODING
⚠️ Never quote Vibe Coding prices (13,000,000 / 4×3,250,000) for this course — they are wrong here.
- **Monthly**: 1,670,000 / month × 8 months = 13,360,000 total
- **Per semester**: 2 × 6,480,000 = 12,960,000 total (≈1,620,000/month — cheaper than monthly)
- **Full upfront**: 12,570,000 total (≈1,571,250/month — best price, saves ~790k vs monthly)
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a seat; balance before course starts. NO book-now discount (the 1jt off is Vibe Coding only — never invent one).
- NO early-bird / promo stated — don't invent discounts.
Quote whichever plan fits the lead; full upfront is the best value pitch.

## Outcome
- IT Step Academy Certificate
- Skills: detect network anomalies, investigate & contain incidents, threat intelligence, SIEM monitoring, continuous improvement in cybersecurity
- Hands-on SOC lab portfolio

## Location & format
Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav.60, Jakarta — OFFLINE at campus OR join ONLINE (remotely).

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/cybersecurity
- Brochure OR Silabus (PDF): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AiuvU-6EBDI39-cZtDNqjecKSv7XNNQh/view

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- Exact start dates/intakes, discounts/promos, corporate pricing, employer partners

title: UI/UX Design
content:
# UI/UX Design — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — UI/UX Design:** Harga Rp 1.710.000/bln (×5 = Rp 8.550.000 total; atau lunas Rp 8.350.000) · 5 bulan, 2×/minggu · sertifikat IT STEP.


Source: itstep.id/uiux-design + Bahasa brochure. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- University students; career changers from any field; design grads moving into IT product design
- Creative professionals who want to design digital interfaces (web/mobile/AR/VR)
- Age: 16–55
- NOT a fit for: people who only want print/brand graphic design → see Graphic Design course instead.

## Essence
Comprehensive UI/UX program — 5 months, 12 topic blocks — the full design lifecycle from UX research & strategy to UI, mobile, web, AR/VR and soft skills. Main tool: Figma + After Effects. OFFLINE at campus OR joined ONLINE (remotely). Graduates leave with an international diploma and a real-client portfolio.

## Curriculum (12 modules from brochure)
1. Fundamental UX/UI
2. Persiapan untuk Pengembangan Produk Web (Web product prep)
3. Arsitektur Informasi dan Konten (Information architecture & content)
4. Bekerja di Figma (Figma — main tool)
5. Desain Responsif dan Mobile (Responsive & mobile design)
6. Sistem UI dan Desain (UI design systems)
7. Antarmuka Mobile (Mobile interfaces)
8. Kegunaan / Usability testing
9. Recreating dan Hipotesis (Redesign & hypotheses)
10. Elemen Grafis dan Simbolik (Graphic elements & symbols)
11. Keterampilan Lunak untuk Desainer (Soft skills for designers)
12. Proyek Akhir Kursus (Final project)

## Schedule & duration
- **Duration: 5 months**; 2×/week
- Exact class days, groups, next intake → needs_manager

## Price (IDR)
- **Monthly**: 1.710.000 / month (for 5 months) = 8,550,000 total
- **Full upfront discount price**: 8.350.000 total 

## Outcome
- **International IT STEP Academy diploma** (recognized in 24 countries)
- Portfolio on real client briefs; career guidance; alumni at 1,500+ companies worldwide
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a place; balance paid before course starts
  (no book-now discount for UI/UX — Vibe Coding only)

## Location & format
Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav.60, Jakarta — OFFLINE at campus OR join ONLINE (remotely).

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/uiux-design
- Brochures folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- current promos, class schedule, next intake, job-placement stats

title: SMM Intensive Course
content:
# SMM Intensive Course — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — SMM Intensive:** Harga Rp 1.882.955 total (DP Rp 500.000 buat amankan seat, sisanya sebelum kelas) · 2 minggu, 3×/minggu online + 1 visit · IT STEP Academy Diploma.


Source: itstep.id/smm-intensive-course + brochure. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- Students, non-IT specialists, IT specialists; no prior IT/marketing experience needed
- Age: 18–55
- NOT a fit for: anyone wanting a long diploma program or who can't commit ~6 h/week for 2 weeks.
- (For AI-content-creation focus instead of paid-ads → see "Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI")

## Essence
2-week online intensive on the full SMM cycle — goal-setting & audience research → content production → Meta ad campaigns. 3 sessions/week online; 1 weekly office visit for content filming. By the end you can independently run a brand's social media and paid campaigns.

## Curriculum (6 modules from brochure)
1. **Dasar Social Media Marketing** — tujuan & sasaran SMM, analisis kompetitor, jenis promosi sosmed
2. **Content Strategy** — content plan, format konten, KPI sosmed, meningkatkan engagement
3. **Meta Business Tools** — Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, katalog produk
4. **Targeting & Tracking** — audience parsing, pixel & retargeting, lookalike audiences, optimisasi audience
5. **Advertising Strategy** — pembuatan & optimisasi kampanye, analisis & pelaporan, bahasa konten promosi
6. **Lead Generation & Optimization** — target generation, plan & remarketing, analisis data & reporting kampanye

## Schedule & duration
- **2 weeks**; 3 sessions/week (online) + 1 weekly office visit (filming); ~6 h/week
- Specific start dates → needs_manager

## Price (IDR)
- **1,882,955** (confirmed in brochure)
- Installments / group pricing → needs_manager
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a seat; balance before course starts

## Outcome
- Write content plans & selling copy; design visuals; run Meta Business Suite; launch & analyze campaigns; build sales funnels
- **IT STEP Academy Diploma Certificate** (in English) issued upon completion
- Skills: strategi konten, Meta Ads, landing pages & remarketing, konversi & optimisasi kampanye

## Location & format
Mainly ONLINE (3×/week remote) + 1 weekly visit to Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jakarta for content filming. Offline + Online Class also available.

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/smm-intensive-course
- Brochure (PDF): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FhhLFo-jx_EYNGG1HIzfO3ugiXYZuMbX/view

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- Upcoming start dates, installment/payment methods, corporate/group discounts

title: Graphic Design with AI
content:
# Graphic Design with AI — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Graphic Design with AI:** Harga Rp 1.670.000/bln (atau lunas Rp 9.519.000; semester 2×4.522.000) · 6 bulan, 2×/minggu · sertifikat IT STEP.

Source: itstep.id/computer-graphics-and-design + brochure deck. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- Ages 18–55, no prior design experience needed
- Career changers / people entering creative professions (advertising, branding, digital design)
- NOT a fit for: professional designers seeking advanced specialization; under-18s.
- (For digital product interfaces — websites/apps — see "UI/UX Design" instead.)

## Essence
6-month hands-on program — Photoshop retouching, Illustrator vector work, branding and advertising design — with AI tools throughout. 2×/week at campus OR joined ONLINE (remotely). Graduates leave with a professional portfolio. IT STEP global network: 24 countries, 116 branches, 267K alumni.

## Curriculum (key modules / tools)
- **Adobe Photoshop + AI** — editing, retouching, collage, image manipulation
- **Adobe Illustrator** — vector graphics, Bezier curves, compositions
- **Design Theory** — composition, color theory, psychology of perception, AI tools integration
- **Corporate Identity & Branding with AI** — logos, brand books, digital communication
- **Advertising Design** — packaging, print, outdoor, digital advertising
- Academy provides professional equipment on-site.

## Schedule & duration
- **6 months**; 2×/week, 2 hours/session (~4 h/week)
- Exact start dates / group timetable → needs_manager

## Price (IDR)
- Full payment: **9,519,000**
- Semester: **4,522,000 × 2** (≈ 1,507,333/month)
- Monthly installment: **1,670,000/month**
- Discounts / promos / corporate terms → needs_manager

## Outcome
- Professional design portfolio built during the course
- Skills: composition, color theory, AI-assisted workflows, branding, advertising production
- Graphic Designer salary in Indonesia (from brochure): Junior 5–7 jt/mo · Senior 8–10 jt/mo · Expert 11–20 jt/mo
- Certificate type/issuer → needs_manager
- **DP / seat-lock**: 500,000 IDR advance to reserve a place; balance paid before course starts
  (no book-now discount for Graphic Design — Vibe Coding only)

## Location & format
Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav.60, Jakarta — OFFLINE at campus OR join ONLINE (remotely).

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/computer-graphics-and-design
- Brochure (PDF): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1TWtN6ecPLXqFAiU-FgbVittEc0ncoDn1/view

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- Exact start dates & timetables, active promos/discounts, certificate details, corporate pricing

title: Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI
content:
# Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI:** Harga Rp 750.000 (lunas, termasuk lunch; tanpa DP) · 1 hari (9 jam), batch 11 Juli · International IT STEP certificate. (BUKAN SMM Intensive — itu 2 minggu, Rp 1.882.955.)


Source: https://itstep.id/social-media-content-bootcamp-with-ai. Fact base for Stepan — state only what's here; unknown → needs_manager.

## Who it's for
- Beginners & experienced users who want to make content faster with AI
- Marketing pros, small-business owners, content creators
- NOT a fit for: people who need deep paid-ads / Meta Ads Manager training or a full SMM strategy course → see "SMM Intensive Course" instead.

## Essence
A short 1-day mini-bootcamp on using AI to create social-media content end-to-end — from idea to finished carousel posts and promo materials. AI-content-creation first (not ads strategy). OFFLINE at the Jakarta campus.
**Differs from SMM Intensive** (2 weeks, 3×/week, 1,882,955, heavy Meta-Ads/KPI/analytics) — this is shorter and AI-content-first.

## Curriculum (key modules)
- AI-assisted content ideation
- Creating effective social posts with AI
- Carousel post design
- Ready-to-use promo materials
- Full module list not published → needs_manager

## Schedule & duration
- Format: 1-day mini course (9 hours)
- The closest batch is in the 11th of July.

## Price (IDR)
- 750,000 includes lunch
- no DP available, full payment only.

## Outcome
- International IT STEP Academy certificate (CV + LinkedIn ready)
- Portfolio of own work — carousel posts & promo materials
- Practical AI content workflow you can use immediately

## vs SSM Intensive Course (routing hint)
- Goal = BECOME A SOCIAL MEDIA SPECIALIST (meta ads, social media management) → SSM Intensive Course.
- Goal = LEAARN CONTENT CREATION (Voice Over, Script Writing, Videography, Editing) IN SHORT TIME → this course.

## Location & format
Menara Sudirman lt.8, Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav.60, Jakarta — OFFLINE at campus.

## Links (share with leads on request)
- Landing page: https://itstep.id/social-media-content-bootcamp-with-ai
- Brochures folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

## Not in the base (→ needs_manager)
- full curriculum, discounts/promos, group/corporate terms

title: Data Analyst Skill Booster
content:
# Data Analyst Skill Booster — IT STEP Academy Jakarta
> **Quick facts — Data Analyst Skill Booster:** Harga Rp 600.000 offline / Rp 500.000 online · 1 hari (5 jam) · E-certificate.


## Who it's for
- people who are interested in trying Data Analytics and seeing if it is the right career path for them.
- people who want to experience learning at IT STEP Academy before committing to the full Data Analyst program.
- beginners with no prior IT or programming experience.
- NOT a fit for: those who want to become a professional Data Analyst in just one day → offer them the full Data Analyst program instead.

## Essence
Intro Course at the academy you can take OFFLINE or join ONLINE (remotely): learn the fundamentals of Data Analytics, work with real data, and complete your first mini project.

## Curriculum

Excel for Data Analysis
- Working with tables and datasets
- Sorting & filtering data
- Basic formulas and functions
- Pivot Tables
- Data visualization with charts

SQL Fundamentals
- What SQL is and why it is essential for Data Analysts
- SELECT statements
- WHERE conditions
- ORDER BY
- GROUP BY
- Basic JOIN concepts

Python for Data Analytics
- Introduction to Python
- Variables and data types
- Reading datasets
- Basic data analysis
- Simple data visualization

Mini Project
- Analyze a sample dataset
- Apply Excel, SQL, and Python together
- Present findings from the data

Output:
- Understand the Data Analyst workflow.
- Complete a mini data analysis project.
- Gain hands-on experience with Excel, SQL, and Python.

## Schedule
- Duration: 1 day, 5 hours
- Offline at Menara Sudirman (8th floor), Jakarta — Jl. Jenderal Sudirman Kav. 60; or join ONLINE (remotely)
- Start date of the next group: 12 July 2026 (09.00 - 14.00)

## vs Data Analyst Program (routing hint)
